description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the julialang/julia:v0.4.6 Docker image for a job named test:0.4.6 and the julialang/julia:v0.5.0-dev image for a job named test:0.5.0-dev. Both jobs run in the default test stage and execute the same script: first run `/opt/julia/bin/julia -e 'Pkg.clone(pwd()); Pkg.test("MyPackage", coverage = true)'` then run `/opt/julia/bin/julia -e 'Pkg.add("Coverage"); cd(Pkg.dir("MyPackage")); using Coverage; cl, tl = get_summary(process_folder()); println("(", cl/tl*100, "% ) covered")'`. The test:0.5.0-dev job is allowed to fail. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
